title: Bitcoin Price Drops Below $66,000 as Global Stocks Hit All-Time Highs and Capital Rotates to AI
description: Bitcoin price has crashed below $66,000, its lowest since February, while the S&P 500 breaks records above 7,600. With $3.4 billion in ETF outflows, $1.84 billion in liquidations, and Strategy's first BTC sale in four years, the crypto-equity divergence deepens as capital rotates toward AI.The post Bitcoin Price Drops Below $66,000 as Global Stocks Hit All-Time Highs and Capital Rotates to AI appeared first on Memeburn.
